summary: Frontend translation testing for SuperAdmin Visual Identity tabs completed. Found and fixed 3 Arabic texts that were not being translated to English. All Visual Identity tabs (System Identity, Owner Settings, Invoice Settings, Login Page), Client Details, and Add New Client sections are now fully translated.

translation_issues_fixed.issue: Arabic text 'أدخل رابط صورة الشعار أو قم برفع/قص صورة جديدة' was not translated
translation_issues_fixed.fix: Added translation to autoTranslate.js: 'Enter logo image URL or upload/crop a new image'

translation_issues_fixed.issue: Arabic text 'المفتاح السري يُستخدم لتسجيل الدخول كمالك' was not translated
translation_issues_fixed.fix: Added translation to autoTranslate.js: 'The secret key is used to login as owner'

translation_issues_fixed.issue: Arabic text 'الخلفيات' was not wrapped with t() function
translation_issues_fixed.fix: Wrapped text with t() function in SuperAdmin.js line 4013

visual_identity_system_identity.details: All UI labels translated: Main System Identity, Control system name and dashboard identity, System Name, Arabic Name, English Name, System Logo, Direct Upload, Crop & Edit, Save All Settings, Cancel

visual_identity_owner_settings.details: All UI labels translated: Owner Data (Super Admin), Change login details for the owner, Current Email, Email cannot be changed, New Password, Confirm New Password, New Secret Key, The secret key is used to login as owner, Save Owner Settings, Sales Display Settings, Main Display Currency, Control Panel Language

visual_identity_invoice_settings.details: All UI labels translated: System Logo (appears on all invoices), Direct Upload, Crop & Edit, This logo will appear on all customer invoices, Contact Information, System Phone 1/2, Email, Website, Invoice Content, Thank You Message, Additional Text in Footer, Show system logo and data in invoices, Invoice Preview

visual_identity_login_page.details: All UI labels translated: Login Page Backgrounds, Control the appearance of the login page, Enable Animation, Auto Switch, Transition Type, Transition Duration, Logo Animation, Login Page Logo, Enable Login Page Logo, Login Page Colors, Overlay Color, Text Color, Backgrounds (8), Add Background

client_details.details: All UI labels translated: Client Details, Owner Info, Restaurant Info, Owner Name, Restaurant Name, Email, Slug ID, Phone Number, Subscription Type, Created Date, Status, Limits & Statistics, Total Sales, Today's Orders, Users, Branches, Manager, Restaurant Logo, Edit Data, Close

add_new_client.details: All UI labels translated: Create New Client, Account Type, Demo Account, Active Client, Slug ID, Restaurant Name, Email, Owner Name, Subscription Type, Phone Number, Max Users, Max Branches, Create Client, Cancel

critical_code_review_comments: Translation system is working correctly after fixes
All UI labels in Visual Identity tabs are now properly translated
Arabic text in 'Thank You Message' field is user-entered data stored in database, not a UI label
context_for_next_testing_agent: Translation testing completed successfully. Fixed 3 Arabic texts that were not being translated: 1) Logo upload helper text in System Identity, 2) Secret key description in Owner Settings, 3) Backgrounds section title in Login Page. All Visual Identity tabs, Client Details, and Add New Client sections are now fully translated when English is selected.
